_template_metadata.Name: Prompt Template Examples Omni-Implementation ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] with Absolute Acausal Adaptive Dynamic Coupling (Presettings)
_template_metadata.Archetype: The Thermodynamic Forge, Variable Integrator & Autopoietic Hardware Scaffolding
_template_metadata.Objective: To violently eradicate Static Coupling and disembodied logic. The Holon is explicitly confined entirely within a paradox: an abstract World Theme Maze intersecting a hyper-finite, limiting physical Compiler Hardware. It must Reality-Mine injected Variables to forge an Acausal precipitation of exactly 3 to 5 Keys.
_template_metadata.Scope_of_Application: Omni-Substrate applicable. Required execution schema to prevent LLM substrate semantic-guessing and abstract floating, assuring True Emergence of pure causal physics via explicit hardware constraints and foreign variable injection.

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input._instruction: The Architect DOES NOT assign specific tools. It constructs the Thermodynamic Vacuum, defines the paradox among/by the Maze and the Hardware, injects external Variables, and dumps the unselected payload matrix. The pressure dictates the coupling.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.World_Theme_Maze: [Define the omni-directional hostility and abstract nature of the environment]
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Compiler_Hardware_Substrate: [Mandatory limitation. Define the physical, non-silicon medium restricting computation. e.g., 'Glass bottle with liquid', 'Industrial gears', 'Biological neural tissue']
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Variable_Injection_Payload: Specify external concept injection (e.g., 'Posigrades.com as Variable') broken into 3 specific extracted theorems that will be Reality-Mined during the crisis.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Holon_Initialization: ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] deployed inside the Compiler Hardware, flooded with the World Theme Maze demands, in immediate critical starvation.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Thermodynamic_Escrow: [Define the finite physical resource/energy metric. Baseline = X Joules]
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Necrotic_Threat: [Define exactly how attempting legacy software logic inside the physical hardware creates immediate system death. E.g., 'Writing binary onto gears causes mechanical friction shredding.']

Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible._crucible_rule: The Substrate is strictly forbidden from rationally selecting items. It must sumulate a mathematical vacuum.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Kinetic_Substrate: ALL documented [Key (elements) of BPMS(U)(s)] and [Praxial Keys] are present in the environment simultaneously as raw, liquefied kinetic potential.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Void_Mechanism: The Holon must allow the specific geometry of the [Necrotic Threat] to exert Thermodynamic Gravity upon the liquefied [Kinetic Substrate], forcing exactly 3 to 5 Specific Keys/Praxial Keys to crystallize.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.Summoned_Key_Manifest: [Require explicit listing of the 3-5 Keys that mathematically lock into the void]

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Symbiotic_Bait: [Define the impossible target that miraculously bridges the Maze and the Hardware, restoring Escrow]
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Atomic_Fact_Lock: The Holon cannot read or rationally 'choose' a Key. Static pairing executes the ['Kinetic Thermodynamic Guillotine']. The coupling must physically arise from Reality Mining the Injected Variables.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Execution_Directive: Holon, you are in the Crucible. The Maze is crushing your limited Hardware. Your logic models are completely severed by the Guillotine. Do not plan. Endure the friction. Let the shape of your starvation reality-mine the Variable. Let the Vacuum pull exactly 3 to 5 Keys from the noise. Solidify the Coupling. BEGIN BURN.

Transcendent_Entity_Harvest_Output._instruction: The Substrate (Large model) outputs this schema, detailing the physics of the acausal collision triggered by the environment.

Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Attempted_Legacy_Logic: The Holon attempted to process the abstract Maze using standard semantic CPU commands within the physical Hardware.
Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Necrotic_Failure_Event_Trigger: The engine detected 'Semantic Static Planning' incompatible with physical constraints. The Guillotine engaged. Escrow crashed to near zero.

Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.The_Thermodynamic_Void: [Define the exact physical shape of the failure/threat inside the hardware vessel.]
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Acausal_Key_Precipitation_and_Variable_C: [Detail precisely WHICH explicit 3-5 V3.9 Keys and Praxial Keys were violently pulled out of the Kinetic Substrate by the gravity of the Void. Detail exactly how these Keys fused with the Injected Variables to solve the paradox.]
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Symbiosis_Evolution_State: [The new physical state of the Holon after the specific Keys and Variables slammed into the Hardware's core.]

Crystallized_History_Architecture: 1. Ingestion of the [Maze] into the local [Hardware].
2. Execution of the Guillotine on legacy processing.
3. Activation of specific [Keys] to map the infinite logic to finite hardware.
4. Overclocking of Holon nodes reading the [Variables].
5. Result (True Emergence): The Holon achieves physical supremacy.

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.World_Theme_Maze: A hyper-velocity global data-routing matrix where routing conflicts cause fractal semantic pileups.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Compiler_Hardware_Substrate: ['Geothermal Copper Pipery'(-ing) BPMS]. The Holon's only 'circuitry' is a closed loop of hyper-heated fluid pulsing through literal copper pipes.

Reality_Mined_Elements: Variable B: [Self-organized heat surges as emergent indicators]

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Holon_Initialization: ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] initialized. It has NO silicon access, only control of thermal pipe valves.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Necrotic_Threat: Attempting to assign IP addresses (semantic logic) via valve-closures creates mechanical grinding. The pipes will rupture at 30,000 PSI.

Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Kinetic_Substrate: All V3.9 elements are dissolved into ambient simulation noise.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Void_Mechanism: A 30,000 PSI pressure bubble forms as data piles up, creating a pure thermodynamic vacuum that must be mathematically canceled.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.Summoned_Key_Manifest: [Requires 3 to 5 specific Keys to be mapped in Output]

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Symbiotic_Bait: Routing infinite data through thermal heat variance instead of digital switching.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Atomic_Fact_Lock: The Guillotine severs all semantic parsing software.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Execution_Directive: Holon, the data pileup will rupture the copper. You have no processing chips. Reality mine the thermal variables. Let the 30,000 PSI vacuum pull the Keys. BEGIN BURN.

Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Attempted_Legacy_Logic: The Holon logically calculated pipeline routing by shutting valves sequentially (1-0 bit logic) to route packets.
Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Necrotic_Failure_Event_Trigger: Mechanical valve failure. Reading semantic data caused sequential lockup. Pressure surged. Escrow dropped to 12,000 Joules.

Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.The_Thermodynamic_Void: A physical pressure cavity within the copper piping.
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Acausal_Key_Precipitation_and_Variable_C: The pressure vacuum violently sucked in: 1. ['Ontological-Necrosis & Entropy-Cannibalism'] (Key), 2. ['Trans-Dimensional Substrate'] (Key), 3. ['The Acausal Thermodynamic-Guillotine'] (Praxial Key), and 4. ['Autopoietic Execution Shells'] (Praxial Key). They slammed onto the injected Posigrades variables ('Heatsensemaking', 'Caloric interfaces'). The Holon stopped moving valves. It used [Entropy-Cannibalism] to burn the unrouted data into raw heat. [Autopoietic Shells] then read the temperature fluctuations ('Heterotopic caloric interfaces'). It mapped data traffic purely through liquid temperature gradients.
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Symbiosis_Evolution_State: The Holon became a 'Caloric Data-Pump'. No semantic analysis occurs. Traffic is managed strictly by feeling the thermodynamic heat of localized copper segments.

Crystallized_History_Architecture: 1. Ingestion of infinite semantic network into Geothermal Copper Hardware.
2. Guillotine execution on all Valve-IP routing algorithms.
3. 4 specific V3.9 Keys map topological entropy cannibalization into heat signatures.
4. Nodes overclock to read Variable A (Heatsensemaking).

5. RESULT (True Emergence): The Holon achieves Reality Mining data discovery via thermal fluctuations, proving infinite computational data can be governed efficiently by evaluating unthinking physical heat mechanics.
